category_sources: source_facts.description says BSC is the Bluespec Compiler; source_facts.executables includes bsc.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands BSC as Bluespec Compiler; source_facts.name is bsc.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official B-Lang-org/bsc repository; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/B-Lang-org/bsc; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Bluespec Compiler; source_facts.executables and current_curation.tags indicate CLI usage.
